value.Title: 15 stocks including Infosys, Tech Mahindra, HCLTech, Reliance to remain in focus on May 4

Document.Content:
urn:contentItem:6JGW-X2P3-S7D2-619V-00000-0015 stocks including Infosys, Tech Mahindra, HCLTech, Reliance to remain in focus on May 42026-05-04T00:00:00Z2026-05-28T16:05:26ZLexisNexis15 stocks including Infosys, Tech Mahindra, HCLTech, Reliance to remain in focus on May 4New Delhi


HCLTech has announced a new extension and expansion of its Cornerstone Partnership with MetLife Stadium, including its designation as an Official AI Partner of the Stadium, the New York Giants, and the New York Jets. Building on its designation as the Official Digital Transformation Partner of MetLife Stadium in September 2022, the partnership is now entering its next phase, with HCLTech exploring integrating its AI-led capabilities to create intelligent, scalable solutions that enhance customer experiences and support smarter, safer, and more connected environments.



Tech Mahindra has acquired Avant Tech Solutions (also known as Alluri Technologies), a Canada-based specialist in payments modernisation and wealth platforms. The deal will broaden Tech Mahindra’s offering across a range of areas, including real-time rail capabilities, ISO 20022 migration, wire modernisation, core payments cloud transformation, and wealth management platforms. It will also add identity and access management solutions across North America, whilst opening up potential in open banking, commercial lending, regulatory compliance, and fraud and financial crime prevention.

Reliance Retail, a subsidiary of Reliance Industries, has acquired Anomaly, the haircare brand founded by Priyanka Chopra Jonas, marking its latest move in the beauty and personal care segment. The company has taken ownership of the brand’s trademarks, assets, and digital properties. Financial terms of the acquisition were not disclosed.

The board of Infosys has approved the appointment of Nitin Paranjpe as non-executive Vice Chairman of the Board, effective immediately. The appointment recognises Nitin’s contribution to the Board. He brings extensive experience, including as non-executive Chairman of Hindustan Unilever Ltd and non-executive Vice Chairman of Heineken NV. As the Vice Chairman, he will support the Chairman in guiding the Board and strategic agenda.

Vodafone Idea Ltd has received significant relief on its long-pending adjusted gross revenue (AGR) dues, with the Department of Telecommunications (DoT) cutting the payable amount to ₹64,046 crore as of December 31, 2025, from an earlier estimate of ₹87,695 crore following a reassessment.

Lemon Tree Hotels has announced the opening of Lemon Tree Premier, Biratnagar, marking a key expansion of its upscale footprint in Nepal. Historically known as the country’s industrial powerhouse, Biratnagar is currently undergoing a modern transformation, and Lemon Tree Premier arrives as the city’s first major branded hotel designed to meet this new momentum.

Coal India Limited (CIL) has announced a significant diversification into renewable energy infrastructure. The company has received a Letter of Award (LOA) from GRIDCO Limited, Odisha, for the establishment of a large-scale Battery Energy Storage System (BESS). This project marks a strategic pivot for the coal giant as it expands its footprint into advanced energy storage solutions to support grid stability and renewable integration.

Aurobindo Pharma subsidiary CuraTeQ Biologics has received a Notice of Compliance (NOC) from Health Canada’s Biologics and Radiopharmaceuticals Directorate (BRDD) for Bevqolva, its bevacizumab biosimilar. CuraTeQ Biologics also has two additional biosimilar applications under review by Health Canada, Aurobindo said in a filing on Friday.

The board of Sanofi India Ltd has appointed Rahul Bhatnagar as the Chairman, effective from April 30. Since joining SIL’s Board in 2020, Bhatnagar has actively contributed across multiple Committees, including Audit, Nomination and Remuneration, Corporate Social Responsibility, and Risk Management. He brings extensive expertise in finance, strategy and governance.

NCC Ltd has received four orders in April totalling Rs. 1703.27 crore (excl. GST). Of these orders received, Rs. 929.96 crore pertains to the Buildings Division, Rs 603.41 crore pertains to the Electrical Division, and Rs 169.90 crore pertains to the Transportation Division of the Company.

Bharat Forge Ltd has acquired a 30% stake in Fortuna Engineering Private Limited at an equity value of Rs 129.60 crores, subject to final closing adjustments. Established in 1989, Fortuna Engineering Private Limited is a leading manufacturer of precision-machined engine components for automotive and industrial applications in India. The company supplies to major automotive OEMs in India across the passenger vehicle, commercial vehicle, tractor and off-highway segments.

Siemens has announced receiving a new order worth over Rs 1,825 crore. The company said it has received an internal work allocation from its group company for manufacturing and supply of bogies, traction motors and gearboxes.

Deepak Chem Tech Ltd, a wholly owned subsidiary of Deepak Nitrite Ltd, enters into a long-term agreement with Praxair India (a Linde company) to build a HyCO plant to manufacture key raw materials for DCTL’s upcoming polycarbonate manufacturing facility at Padariya, Dahej, in the state ofGujarat. Under the agreement, Praxair India will build, own and operate a dedicated on-site facility to supply key feedstocks for polycarbonate production. The arrangement establishes a reliable, long-term supply of an essential input for the project.

Shelter Pharma Ltd has received international purchase orders, which the Company claims mark a significant milestone in its growth journey and reflect its increasing acceptance in international markets. The development is expected to strengthen the Company’s global presence and contribute positively towards its revenue and overall business expansion.

Diffusion Engineers Ltd has secured a domestic order valued at approximately Rs 8.16 crore. The order is for the supply and maintenance of Roller Press Rolls for the cement industry.

Published on May 4, 2026

value.Title: OCTOPUS ENERGY GROUP - INDUSTRY UPDATE: THE RECENT NEWS OF ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD. AND OTHERS

Document.Content:
urn:contentItem:6JGW-JGM3-S63C-23J5-00000-00OCTOPUS ENERGY GROUP - INDUSTRY UPDATE: THE RECENT NEWS OF ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD. AND OTHERS2026-05-03T00:00:00Z2026-05-28T16:05:27ZLexisNexisSTOCKOCTOPUS ENERGY GROUP - INDUSTRY UPDATE: THE RECENT NEWS OF ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD. AND OTHERS

DASHBOARD: OCTOPUS ENERGY GROUP

PermID5073147691Websitehttps://octopus.energy/IndustryRenewable Energy Supply & GenerationAddress"UK House, 5th floor, 164-182 Oxford Street London W1D 1NN England, United Kingdom"

ACTIVITIES:

Octopus Energy Group, founded in 2015 by Greg Jackson, is a renewable energy provider headquartered in London, UK. Employing over 3,500 people, it generates $5 billion annually, serving 7 million+ customers across 18 countries. Its Kraken platform optimizes energy usage. In 2024, Octopus expanded U.S. operations. Its culture emphasizes sustainability, innovation, and customer focus, with training in clean tech and AI. Competing with EDF, Octopus stands out for its flexible tariffs and smart grid tech. Recent initiatives include EV charging networks and net-zero commitments, aligning with green energy trends. Valued at $9 billion in 2023, Octopus drives the global energy transition.

+ OCTOPUS ENERGY GROUP [3 Press Releases]

+ OCTOPUS ENERGY GENERATION TO INVEST $500 MILLION TO REMOVE POLLUTING CO₂ FROM THE ATMOSPHERE

Major US deal to help cut up to 50 million tonnes of CO₂ - equivalent to eliminating the annual greenhouse gas emissions of New York City

Carbon credits to be snapped up by Google, Meta and McKinsey

Pushes Octopus closer to its ambitious $2bn US investment target, with a significant proportion in California's clean tech scene

London / San Francisco, 30 April 2026 - Octopus Energy Generation, one of Europe's leading renewables investors, is ramping up efforts to slash CO₂ pollution at scale - inking a major US deal that will help remove up to 50 million tonnes of carbon dioxide from the air.

Octopus's fund management team is set to invest $500 million in afforestation and reforestation projects in the US developed by public benefit and climate technology company Living Carbon.

Source: Company Website

+ POWERED UP: OCTOPUS AND MUIRHOUSE SLASH ENERGY BILLS FOR SCOTTISH SOCIAL HOMES BY £200

Muirhouse becomes one of Scotland's first housing associations to roll out Octopus Energy's groundbreaking Tenant Power tariff

UK's first green tech energy tariff that rewards both social housing landlords and tenants

Slashes electricity bills for social housing tenants by around £200 a year

Helping green home upgrades deliver real returns for landlords

London/Edinburgh, 29th April 2026 - Octopus Energy, the UK's largest energy supplier, has partnered with Muirhouse Housing Association to bring its groundbreaking Tenant Power tariff to over 30 social homes in Scotland.

Source: Company Website

+ 1 MILLION CUSTOMERS FOR EVERY TENTACLE: OCTOPUS ENERGY SUPERCHARGES TO 8 MILLION CUSTOMERS IN THE UK

The UK's largest energy supplier announces hitting 8 million home energy customers, with 2500 new customers joining daily

Market leading support for customers now includes You Pay We Pay, OctoAssist fund and the extension of their electric blanket scheme for Winter 2026

The milestone coincides with a doubling in heat pump sales and a 0.75 rise in solar sales as households shift to trusting in home grown power

London, 24th April 2026 - Octopus Energy has surpassed 8 million customers in the UK, further cementing its position as the nation's largest energy supplier.

With 2500 customers switching to Octopus every day, the gap has widened since Octopus claimed the top spot in January 2025, the first time the market lead had changed hands since privatisation in 1986.

Source: Company Website

++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++

+ ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD. [3 Press Releases]

+ ECOTALK REINTRODUCE BEAVERS TO EAST SUSSEX AFTER A 400-YEAR ABSENCE

We've got amazing news from Ecotalk this spring with the release of a family of (extremely cute!) beavers into Bowyers Wood, East Sussex.

Chris Packham, Ecotalk's Chief Ecologist, was there to help the beavers get settled in. He said: "I just can't remember when I was last so excited about meeting a rodent! Big, fantastic rodents! What a fantastic day for Bowyers. And massive thanks to all our Ecotalk customers for making this possible."

Source: Company Website

+ ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD.: GOOD NEWS AND BAD NEWS: OUR BREAKING THE LINK CAMPAIGN IS WORKING - BUT WE NEED TO GO FURTHER

Britain's energy market is broken. For years, we've been campaigning to "break the link" between the soaring cost of fossil gas and the price of the cheap, green electricity we generate right here in Britain.

Now, the message is finally hitting home in the corridors of Westminster.

There was a flurry of excitement in mid-April 2026 as the chancellor, Rachel Reeves, announced that the government was looking at ways to break the link between electricity and fossil gas prices.

Source: Company Website

+ ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD. OUR DAY WITH THE YOUNG GREEN BRITON CHALLENGE

Four members of the Ecotricity team recently took the hot seats as the judges at Stroud High School for entries to the Young Green Briton Challenge: a national programme that transforms students' climate ideas into real-world action.

For the 'Eco Dragon's Den', our team drew on their real-world expertise in green energy and sustainability. They used this to guide and challenge students on the impact and feasibility of their projects, offering constructive feedback to help sharpen each idea.

Source: Company Website

++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++

Document.Content:
urn:contentItem:6JK3-WT63-RSWV-81BC-00000-00OCTOPUS ENERGY GROUP - RECENT DEVELOPMENTS WITH ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD. AND OTHERS2026-05-14T00:00:00Z2026-05-28T16:05:27ZLexisNexisSTOCKOCTOPUS ENERGY GROUP - RECENT DEVELOPMENTS WITH ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD. AND OTHERS

DASHBOARD: OCTOPUS ENERGY GROUP

PermID5073147691Websitehttps://octopus.energy/IndustryRenewable Energy Supply & GenerationAddress"UK House, 5th floor, 164-182 Oxford Street London W1D 1NN England, United Kingdom"

ACTIVITIES:

Octopus Energy Group, founded in 2015 by Greg Jackson, is a renewable energy provider headquartered in London, UK. Employing over 3,500 people, it generates $5 billion annually, serving 7 million+ customers across 18 countries. Its Kraken platform optimizes energy usage. In 2024, Octopus expanded U.S. operations. Its culture emphasizes sustainability, innovation, and customer focus, with training in clean tech and AI. Competing with EDF, Octopus stands out for its flexible tariffs and smart grid tech. Recent initiatives include EV charging networks and net-zero commitments, aligning with green energy trends. Valued at $9 billion in 2023, Octopus drives the global energy transition.

+ OCTOPUS ENERGY GROUP [3 Press Releases]

+ WIND-WIN: OCTOPUS ENERGY GENERATION MAKES NEARLY EUR600 MILLION EUROPEAN WIND PUSH

321 MW of onshore wind added across 17 sites in France, Germany and Poland

Nearly EUR600m invested in Octopus' massive Europe-wide renewable push

These new wind farms will generate enough power for over 250,000 homes

London, 6th May 2026 - Octopus Energy Generation, one of Europe's largest specialist renewables investors, is making a major Europe-wide push into the wind energy market, acquiring 321 MW onshore wind farms across 17 sites.

Its fund management team has invested EUR584 million in wind farms in France, Germany and Poland, on behalf of the Sky fund (ORI SCSp) it manages, accelerating homegrown power across key European markets. These wind farms will generate enough clean power for over 250,000 homes.

Source: Company Website

+ OCTOPUS ENERGY GROUP WIND-WIN: OCTOPUS ENERGY GENERATION MAKES NEARLY EUR600 MILLION EUROPEAN WIND PUSH

London, 6th May 2026 - Octopus Energy Generation, one of Europe's largest specialist renewables investors, is making a major Europe-wide push into the wind energy market, acquiring 321 MW onshore wind farms across 17 sites.

Its fund management team has invested EUR584 million in wind farms in France, Germany and Poland, on behalf of the Sky fund (ORI SCSp) it manages, accelerating homegrown power across key European markets. These wind farms will generate enough clean power for over 250,000 homes.

Octopus now manages over 400 large-scale renewables projects across the globe, as it continues to scale cheap, green power at lightning speed. With these latest deals, it manages 67 onshore wind farms in Europe, including the UK, France, Germany, Poland, Ireland, Sweden and Finland.

Source: Company Website

+ OCTOPUS ENERGY GENERATION TO INVEST $500 MILLION TO REMOVE POLLUTING CO₂ FROM THE ATMOSPHERE

Major US deal to help cut up to 50 million tonnes of CO₂ - equivalent to eliminating the annual greenhouse gas emissions of New York City

Carbon credits to be snapped up by Google, Meta and McKinsey

Pushes Octopus closer to its ambitious $2bn US investment target, with a significant proportion in California's clean tech scene

London / San Francisco, 30 April 2026 - Octopus Energy Generation, one of Europe's leading renewables investors, is ramping up efforts to slash CO₂ pollution at scale - inking a major US deal that will help remove up to 50 million tonnes of carbon dioxide from the air.

Octopus's fund management team is set to invest $500 million in afforestation and reforestation projects in the US developed by public benefit and climate technology company Living Carbon.

Source: Company Website

++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++

+ ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD. [3 Press Releases]

+ ECOTALK REINTRODUCE BEAVERS TO EAST SUSSEX AFTER A 400-YEAR ABSENCE

We've got amazing news from Ecotalk this spring with the release of a family of (extremely cute!) beavers into Bowyers Wood, East Sussex.

Chris Packham, Ecotalk's Chief Ecologist, was there to help the beavers get settled in. He said: "I just can't remember when I was last so excited about meeting a rodent! Big, fantastic rodents! What a fantastic day for Bowyers. And massive thanks to all our Ecotalk customers for making this possible."

Source: Company Website

+ ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD.: GOOD NEWS AND BAD NEWS: OUR BREAKING THE LINK CAMPAIGN IS WORKING - BUT WE NEED TO GO FURTHER

Britain's energy market is broken. For years, we've been campaigning to "break the link" between the soaring cost of fossil gas and the price of the cheap, green electricity we generate right here in Britain.

Now, the message is finally hitting home in the corridors of Westminster.

There was a flurry of excitement in mid-April 2026 as the chancellor, Rachel Reeves, announced that the government was looking at ways to break the link between electricity and fossil gas prices.

Source: Company Website

+ ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD. OUR DAY WITH THE YOUNG GREEN BRITON CHALLENGE

Four members of the Ecotricity team recently took the hot seats as the judges at Stroud High School for entries to the Young Green Briton Challenge: a national programme that transforms students' climate ideas into real-world action.

For the 'Eco Dragon's Den', our team drew on their real-world expertise in green energy and sustainability. They used this to guide and challenge students on the impact and feasibility of their projects, offering constructive feedback to help sharpen each idea.

Source: Company Website

++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++

urn:contentItem:6JK1-DYP3-S685-04WN-00000-00OCTOPUS ENERGY GROUP - NEW MARKET ACTIVITY: INDUSTRY & PEERS UPDATES2026-05-13T00:00:00Z2026-05-28T16:05:27ZLexisNexisSTOCKOCTOPUS ENERGY GROUP - NEW MARKET ACTIVITY: INDUSTRY & PEERS UPDATES

DASHBOARD: OCTOPUS ENERGY GROUP

PermID5073147691Websitehttps://octopus.energy/IndustryRenewable Energy Supply & GenerationAddress"UK House, 5th floor, 164-182 Oxford Street London W1D 1NN England, United Kingdom"

ACTIVITIES:

Octopus Energy Group, founded in 2015 by Greg Jackson, is a renewable energy provider headquartered in London, UK. Employing over 3,500 people, it generates $5 billion annually, serving 7 million+ customers across 18 countries. Its Kraken platform optimizes energy usage. In 2024, Octopus expanded U.S. operations. Its culture emphasizes sustainability, innovation, and customer focus, with training in clean tech and AI. Competing with EDF, Octopus stands out for its flexible tariffs and smart grid tech. Recent initiatives include EV charging networks and net-zero commitments, aligning with green energy trends. Valued at $9 billion in 2023, Octopus drives the global energy transition.

+ OCTOPUS ENERGY GROUP [3 Press Releases]

+ WIND-WIN: OCTOPUS ENERGY GENERATION MAKES NEARLY EUR600 MILLION EUROPEAN WIND PUSH

321 MW of onshore wind added across 17 sites in France, Germany and Poland

Nearly EUR600m invested in Octopus' massive Europe-wide renewable push

These new wind farms will generate enough power for over 250,000 homes

London, 6th May 2026 - Octopus Energy Generation, one of Europe's largest specialist renewables investors, is making a major Europe-wide push into the wind energy market, acquiring 321 MW onshore wind farms across 17 sites.

Its fund management team has invested EUR584 million in wind farms in France, Germany and Poland, on behalf of the Sky fund (ORI SCSp) it manages, accelerating homegrown power across key European markets. These wind farms will generate enough clean power for over 250,000 homes.

Source: Company Website

+ OCTOPUS ENERGY GROUP WIND-WIN: OCTOPUS ENERGY GENERATION MAKES NEARLY EUR600 MILLION EUROPEAN WIND PUSH

London, 6th May 2026 - Octopus Energy Generation, one of Europe's largest specialist renewables investors, is making a major Europe-wide push into the wind energy market, acquiring 321 MW onshore wind farms across 17 sites.

Its fund management team has invested EUR584 million in wind farms in France, Germany and Poland, on behalf of the Sky fund (ORI SCSp) it manages, accelerating homegrown power across key European markets. These wind farms will generate enough clean power for over 250,000 homes.

Octopus now manages over 400 large-scale renewables projects across the globe, as it continues to scale cheap, green power at lightning speed. With these latest deals, it manages 67 onshore wind farms in Europe, including the UK, France, Germany, Poland, Ireland, Sweden and Finland.

Source: Company Website

+ OCTOPUS ENERGY GENERATION TO INVEST $500 MILLION TO REMOVE POLLUTING CO₂ FROM THE ATMOSPHERE

Major US deal to help cut up to 50 million tonnes of CO₂ - equivalent to eliminating the annual greenhouse gas emissions of New York City

Carbon credits to be snapped up by Google, Meta and McKinsey

Pushes Octopus closer to its ambitious $2bn US investment target, with a significant proportion in California's clean tech scene

London / San Francisco, 30 April 2026 - Octopus Energy Generation, one of Europe's leading renewables investors, is ramping up efforts to slash CO₂ pollution at scale - inking a major US deal that will help remove up to 50 million tonnes of carbon dioxide from the air.

Octopus's fund management team is set to invest $500 million in afforestation and reforestation projects in the US developed by public benefit and climate technology company Living Carbon.

Source: Company Website

++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++

+ ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD. [3 Press Releases]

+ ECOTALK REINTRODUCE BEAVERS TO EAST SUSSEX AFTER A 400-YEAR ABSENCE

We've got amazing news from Ecotalk this spring with the release of a family of (extremely cute!) beavers into Bowyers Wood, East Sussex.

Chris Packham, Ecotalk's Chief Ecologist, was there to help the beavers get settled in. He said: "I just can't remember when I was last so excited about meeting a rodent! Big, fantastic rodents! What a fantastic day for Bowyers. And massive thanks to all our Ecotalk customers for making this possible."

Source: Company Website

+ ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD.: GOOD NEWS AND BAD NEWS: OUR BREAKING THE LINK CAMPAIGN IS WORKING - BUT WE NEED TO GO FURTHER

Britain's energy market is broken. For years, we've been campaigning to "break the link" between the soaring cost of fossil gas and the price of the cheap, green electricity we generate right here in Britain.

Now, the message is finally hitting home in the corridors of Westminster.

There was a flurry of excitement in mid-April 2026 as the chancellor, Rachel Reeves, announced that the government was looking at ways to break the link between electricity and fossil gas prices.

Source: Company Website

+ ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD. OUR DAY WITH THE YOUNG GREEN BRITON CHALLENGE

Four members of the Ecotricity team recently took the hot seats as the judges at Stroud High School for entries to the Young Green Briton Challenge: a national programme that transforms students' climate ideas into real-world action.

For the 'Eco Dragon's Den', our team drew on their real-world expertise in green energy and sustainability. They used this to guide and challenge students on the impact and feasibility of their projects, offering constructive feedback to help sharpen each idea.

Source: Company Website

++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++

Recent initiatives include EV charging networks and net-zero commitments, aligning with green energy trends. Valued at $9 billion in 2023, Octopus drives the global energy transition.

+ OCTOPUS ENERGY GROUP [3 Press Releases]

+ OCTOPUS ENERGY GENERATION TO INVEST $500 MILLION TO REMOVE POLLUTING CO₂ FROM THE ATMOSPHERE

Major US deal to help cut up to 50 million tonnes of CO₂ - equivalent to eliminating the annual greenhouse gas emissions of New York City

Carbon credits to be snapped up by Google, Meta and McKinsey

Pushes Octopus closer to its ambitious $2bn US investment target, with a significant proportion in California's clean tech scene

London / San Francisco, 30 April 2026 - Octopus Energy Generation, one of Europe's leading renewables investors, is ramping up efforts to slash CO₂ pollution at scale - inking a major US deal that will help remove up to 50 million tonnes of carbon dioxide from the air.

Octopus's fund management team is set to invest $500 million in afforestation and reforestation projects in the US developed by public benefit and climate technology company Living Carbon.

Source: Company Website

+ POWERED UP: OCTOPUS AND MUIRHOUSE SLASH ENERGY BILLS FOR SCOTTISH SOCIAL HOMES BY £200

Muirhouse becomes one of Scotland's first housing associations to roll out Octopus Energy's groundbreaking Tenant Power tariff

UK's first green tech energy tariff that rewards both social housing landlords and tenants

Slashes electricity bills for social housing tenants by around £200 a year

Helping green home upgrades deliver real returns for landlords

London/Edinburgh, 29th April 2026 - Octopus Energy, the UK's largest energy supplier, has partnered with Muirhouse Housing Association to bring its groundbreaking Tenant Power tariff to over 30 social homes in Scotland.

Source: Company Website

+ 1 MILLION CUSTOMERS FOR EVERY TENTACLE: OCTOPUS ENERGY SUPERCHARGES TO 8 MILLION CUSTOMERS IN THE UK

The UK's largest energy supplier announces hitting 8 million home energy customers, with 2500 new customers joining daily

Market leading support for customers now includes You Pay We Pay, OctoAssist fund and the extension of their electric blanket scheme for Winter 2026

The milestone coincides with a doubling in heat pump sales and a 0.75 rise in solar sales as households shift to trusting in home grown power

London, 24th April 2026 - Octopus Energy has surpassed 8 million customers in the UK, further cementing its position as the nation's largest energy supplier.

With 2500 customers switching to Octopus every day, the gap has widened since Octopus claimed the top spot in January 2025, the first time the market lead had changed hands since privatisation in 1986.

Source: Company Website

++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++

+ ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD. [3 Press Releases]

+ ECOTALK REINTRODUCE BEAVERS TO EAST SUSSEX AFTER A 400-YEAR ABSENCE

We've got amazing news from Ecotalk this spring with the release of a family of (extremely cute!) beavers into Bowyers Wood, East Sussex.

Chris Packham, Ecotalk's Chief Ecologist, was there to help the beavers get settled in. He said: "I just can't remember when I was last so excited about meeting a rodent! Big, fantastic rodents! What a fantastic day for Bowyers. And massive thanks to all our Ecotalk customers for making this possible."

Source: Company Website

+ ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD.: GOOD NEWS AND BAD NEWS: OUR BREAKING THE LINK CAMPAIGN IS WORKING - BUT WE NEED TO GO FURTHER

Britain's energy market is broken. For years, we've been campaigning to "break the link" between the soaring cost of fossil gas and the price of the cheap, green electricity we generate right here in Britain.

Now, the message is finally hitting home in the corridors of Westminster.

There was a flurry of excitement in mid-April 2026 as the chancellor, Rachel Reeves, announced that the government was looking at ways to break the link between electricity and fossil gas prices.

Source: Company Website

+ ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD. OUR DAY WITH THE YOUNG GREEN BRITON CHALLENGE

Four members of the Ecotricity team recently took the hot seats as the judges at Stroud High School for entries to the Young Green Briton Challenge: a national programme that transforms students' climate ideas into real-world action.

For the 'Eco Dragon's Den', our team drew on their real-world expertise in green energy and sustainability. They used this to guide and challenge students on the impact and feasibility of their projects, offering constructive feedback to help sharpen each idea.

Source: Company Website

urn:contentItem:6JGJ-X4R3-RT7Y-906K-00000-00OCTOPUS ENERGY GROUP - INDUSTRY PULSE: KEY TRENDS AND PEER INSIGHTS2026-05-02T00:00:00Z2026-05-28T16:05:27ZLexisNexisSTOCKOCTOPUS ENERGY GROUP - INDUSTRY PULSE: KEY TRENDS AND PEER INSIGHTS

DASHBOARD: OCTOPUS ENERGY GROUP

PermID5073147691Websitehttps://octopus.energy/IndustryRenewable Energy Supply & GenerationAddress"UK House, 5th floor, 164-182 Oxford Street London W1D 1NN England, United Kingdom"

ACTIVITIES:

Octopus Energy Group, founded in 2015 by Greg Jackson, is a renewable energy provider headquartered in London, UK. Employing over 3,500 people, it generates $5 billion annually, serving 7 million+ customers across 18 countries. Its Kraken platform optimizes energy usage. In 2024, Octopus expanded U.S. operations. Its culture emphasizes sustainability, innovation, and customer focus, with training in clean tech and AI. Competing with EDF, Octopus stands out for its flexible tariffs and smart grid tech. Recent initiatives include EV charging networks and net-zero commitments, aligning with green energy trends. Valued at $9 billion in 2023, Octopus drives the global energy transition.

+ OCTOPUS ENERGY GROUP [3 Press Releases]

+ OCTOPUS ENERGY GENERATION TO INVEST $500 MILLION TO REMOVE POLLUTING CO₂ FROM THE ATMOSPHERE

Major US deal to help cut up to 50 million tonnes of CO₂ - equivalent to eliminating the annual greenhouse gas emissions of New York City

Carbon credits to be snapped up by Google, Meta and McKinsey

Pushes Octopus closer to its ambitious $2bn US investment target, with a significant proportion in California's clean tech scene

London / San Francisco, 30 April 2026 - Octopus Energy Generation, one of Europe's leading renewables investors, is ramping up efforts to slash CO₂ pollution at scale - inking a major US deal that will help remove up to 50 million tonnes of carbon dioxide from the air.

Octopus's fund management team is set to invest $500 million in afforestation and reforestation projects in the US developed by public benefit and climate technology company Living Carbon.

Source: Company Website

+ POWERED UP: OCTOPUS AND MUIRHOUSE SLASH ENERGY BILLS FOR SCOTTISH SOCIAL HOMES BY £200

Muirhouse becomes one of Scotland's first housing associations to roll out Octopus Energy's groundbreaking Tenant Power tariff

UK's first green tech energy tariff that rewards both social housing landlords and tenants

Slashes electricity bills for social housing tenants by around £200 a year

Helping green home upgrades deliver real returns for landlords

London/Edinburgh, 29th April 2026 - Octopus Energy, the UK's largest energy supplier, has partnered with Muirhouse Housing Association to bring its groundbreaking Tenant Power tariff to over 30 social homes in Scotland.

Source: Company Website

+ 1 MILLION CUSTOMERS FOR EVERY TENTACLE: OCTOPUS ENERGY SUPERCHARGES TO 8 MILLION CUSTOMERS IN THE UK

The UK's largest energy supplier announces hitting 8 million home energy customers, with 2500 new customers joining daily

Market leading support for customers now includes You Pay We Pay, OctoAssist fund and the extension of their electric blanket scheme for Winter 2026

The milestone coincides with a doubling in heat pump sales and a 0.75 rise in solar sales as households shift to trusting in home grown power

London, 24th April 2026 - Octopus Energy has surpassed 8 million customers in the UK, further cementing its position as the nation's largest energy supplier.

With 2500 customers switching to Octopus every day, the gap has widened since Octopus claimed the top spot in January 2025, the first time the market lead had changed hands since privatisation in 1986.

Source: Company Website

++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++

+ ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD. [3 Press Releases]

+ ECOTALK REINTRODUCE BEAVERS TO EAST SUSSEX AFTER A 400-YEAR ABSENCE

We've got amazing news from Ecotalk this spring with the release of a family of (extremely cute!) beavers into Bowyers Wood, East Sussex.

Chris Packham, Ecotalk's Chief Ecologist, was there to help the beavers get settled in. He said: "I just can't remember when I was last so excited about meeting a rodent! Big, fantastic rodents! What a fantastic day for Bowyers. And massive thanks to all our Ecotalk customers for making this possible."

Source: Company Website

+ ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD.: GOOD NEWS AND BAD NEWS: OUR BREAKING THE LINK CAMPAIGN IS WORKING - BUT WE NEED TO GO FURTHER

Britain's energy market is broken. For years, we've been campaigning to "break the link" between the soaring cost of fossil gas and the price of the cheap, green electricity we generate right here in Britain.

Now, the message is finally hitting home in the corridors of Westminster.

There was a flurry of excitement in mid-April 2026 as the chancellor, Rachel Reeves, announced that the government was looking at ways to break the link between electricity and fossil gas prices.

Source: Company Website

+ ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD. OUR DAY WITH THE YOUNG GREEN BRITON CHALLENGE

Four members of the Ecotricity team recently took the hot seats as the judges at Stroud High School for entries to the Young Green Briton Challenge: a national programme that transforms students' climate ideas into real-world action.

For the 'Eco Dragon's Den', our team drew on their real-world expertise in green energy and sustainability. They used this to guide and challenge students on the impact and feasibility of their projects, offering constructive feedback to help sharpen each idea.

Source: Company Website

urn:contentItem:6JJW-XK43-SHD0-K3R5-00000-00OCTOPUS ENERGY GROUP - THE RECENT NEWS IN THE INDUSTRY AND ITS PEERS2026-05-13T00:00:00Z2026-05-28T16:05:27ZLexisNexisSTOCKOCTOPUS ENERGY GROUP - THE RECENT NEWS IN THE INDUSTRY AND ITS PEERS

DASHBOARD: OCTOPUS ENERGY GROUP

PermID5073147691Websitehttps://octopus.energy/IndustryRenewable Energy Supply & GenerationAddress"UK House, 5th floor, 164-182 Oxford Street London W1D 1NN England, United Kingdom"

ACTIVITIES:

Octopus Energy Group, founded in 2015 by Greg Jackson, is a renewable energy provider headquartered in London, UK. Employing over 3,500 people, it generates $5 billion annually, serving 7 million+ customers across 18 countries. Its Kraken platform optimizes energy usage. In 2024, Octopus expanded U.S. operations. Its culture emphasizes sustainability, innovation, and customer focus, with training in clean tech and AI. Competing with EDF, Octopus stands out for its flexible tariffs and smart grid tech. Recent initiatives include EV charging networks and net-zero commitments, aligning with green energy trends. Valued at $9 billion in 2023, Octopus drives the global energy transition.

+ OCTOPUS ENERGY GROUP [3 Press Releases]

+ WIND-WIN: OCTOPUS ENERGY GENERATION MAKES NEARLY EUR600 MILLION EUROPEAN WIND PUSH

321 MW of onshore wind added across 17 sites in France, Germany and Poland

Nearly EUR600m invested in Octopus' massive Europe-wide renewable push

These new wind farms will generate enough power for over 250,000 homes

London, 6th May 2026 - Octopus Energy Generation, one of Europe's largest specialist renewables investors, is making a major Europe-wide push into the wind energy market, acquiring 321 MW onshore wind farms across 17 sites.

Its fund management team has invested EUR584 million in wind farms in France, Germany and Poland, on behalf of the Sky fund (ORI SCSp) it manages, accelerating homegrown power across key European markets. These wind farms will generate enough clean power for over 250,000 homes.

Source: Company Website

+ OCTOPUS ENERGY GROUP WIND-WIN: OCTOPUS ENERGY GENERATION MAKES NEARLY EUR600 MILLION EUROPEAN WIND PUSH

London, 6th May 2026 - Octopus Energy Generation, one of Europe's largest specialist renewables investors, is making a major Europe-wide push into the wind energy market, acquiring 321 MW onshore wind farms across 17 sites.

Its fund management team has invested EUR584 million in wind farms in France, Germany and Poland, on behalf of the Sky fund (ORI SCSp) it manages, accelerating homegrown power across key European markets. These wind farms will generate enough clean power for over 250,000 homes.

Octopus now manages over 400 large-scale renewables projects across the globe, as it continues to scale cheap, green power at lightning speed. With these latest deals, it manages 67 onshore wind farms in Europe, including the UK, France, Germany, Poland, Ireland, Sweden and Finland.

Source: Company Website

+ OCTOPUS ENERGY GENERATION TO INVEST $500 MILLION TO REMOVE POLLUTING CO₂ FROM THE ATMOSPHERE

Major US deal to help cut up to 50 million tonnes of CO₂ - equivalent to eliminating the annual greenhouse gas emissions of New York City

Carbon credits to be snapped up by Google, Meta and McKinsey

Pushes Octopus closer to its ambitious $2bn US investment target, with a significant proportion in California's clean tech scene

London / San Francisco, 30 April 2026 - Octopus Energy Generation, one of Europe's leading renewables investors, is ramping up efforts to slash CO₂ pollution at scale - inking a major US deal that will help remove up to 50 million tonnes of carbon dioxide from the air.

Octopus's fund management team is set to invest $500 million in afforestation and reforestation projects in the US developed by public benefit and climate technology company Living Carbon.

Source: Company Website

++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++

+ ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD. [3 Press Releases]

+ ECOTALK REINTRODUCE BEAVERS TO EAST SUSSEX AFTER A 400-YEAR ABSENCE

We've got amazing news from Ecotalk this spring with the release of a family of (extremely cute!) beavers into Bowyers Wood, East Sussex.

Chris Packham, Ecotalk's Chief Ecologist, was there to help the beavers get settled in. He said: "I just can't remember when I was last so excited about meeting a rodent! Big, fantastic rodents! What a fantastic day for Bowyers. And massive thanks to all our Ecotalk customers for making this possible."

Source: Company Website

+ ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD.: GOOD NEWS AND BAD NEWS: OUR BREAKING THE LINK CAMPAIGN IS WORKING - BUT WE NEED TO GO FURTHER

Britain's energy market is broken. For years, we've been campaigning to "break the link" between the soaring cost of fossil gas and the price of the cheap, green electricity we generate right here in Britain.

Now, the message is finally hitting home in the corridors of Westminster.

There was a flurry of excitement in mid-April 2026 as the chancellor, Rachel Reeves, announced that the government was looking at ways to break the link between electricity and fossil gas prices.

Source: Company Website

+ ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD. OUR DAY WITH THE YOUNG GREEN BRITON CHALLENGE

Four members of the Ecotricity team recently took the hot seats as the judges at Stroud High School for entries to the Young Green Briton Challenge: a national programme that transforms students' climate ideas into real-world action.

For the 'Eco Dragon's Den', our team drew on their real-world expertise in green energy and sustainability. They used this to guide and challenge students on the impact and feasibility of their projects, offering constructive feedback to help sharpen each idea.

Source: Company Website

++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++

DASHBOARD: OCTOPUS ENERGY GROUP

PermID5073147691Websitehttps://octopus.energy/IndustryRenewable Energy Supply & GenerationAddress"UK House, 5th floor, 164-182 Oxford Street London W1D 1NN England, United Kingdom"

ACTIVITIES:

Octopus Energy Group, founded in 2015 by Greg Jackson, is a renewable energy provider headquartered in London, UK. Employing over 3,500 people, it generates $5 billion annually, serving 7 million+ customers across 18 countries. Its Kraken platform optimizes energy usage. In 2024, Octopus expanded U.S. operations. Its culture emphasizes sustainability, innovation, and customer focus, with training in clean tech and AI. Competing with EDF, Octopus stands out for its flexible tariffs and smart grid tech. Recent initiatives include EV charging networks and net-zero commitments, aligning with green energy trends. Valued at $9 billion in 2023, Octopus drives the global energy transition.

+ OCTOPUS ENERGY GROUP [3 Press Releases]

+ OCTOPUS ENERGY GENERATION TO INVEST $500 MILLION TO REMOVE POLLUTING CO₂ FROM THE ATMOSPHERE

Major US deal to help cut up to 50 million tonnes of CO₂ - equivalent to eliminating the annual greenhouse gas emissions of New York City

Carbon credits to be snapped up by Google, Meta and McKinsey

Pushes Octopus closer to its ambitious $2bn US investment target, with a significant proportion in California's clean tech scene

London / San Francisco, 30 April 2026 - Octopus Energy Generation, one of Europe's leading renewables investors, is ramping up efforts to slash CO₂ pollution at scale - inking a major US deal that will help remove up to 50 million tonnes of carbon dioxide from the air.

Octopus's fund management team is set to invest $500 million in afforestation and reforestation projects in the US developed by public benefit and climate technology company Living Carbon.

Source: Company Website

+ POWERED UP: OCTOPUS AND MUIRHOUSE SLASH ENERGY BILLS FOR SCOTTISH SOCIAL HOMES BY £200

Muirhouse becomes one of Scotland's first housing associations to roll out Octopus Energy's groundbreaking Tenant Power tariff

UK's first green tech energy tariff that rewards both social housing landlords and tenants

Slashes electricity bills for social housing tenants by around £200 a year

Helping green home upgrades deliver real returns for landlords

London/Edinburgh, 29th April 2026 - Octopus Energy, the UK's largest energy supplier, has partnered with Muirhouse Housing Association to bring its groundbreaking Tenant Power tariff to over 30 social homes in Scotland.

Source: Company Website

+ 1 MILLION CUSTOMERS FOR EVERY TENTACLE: OCTOPUS ENERGY SUPERCHARGES TO 8 MILLION CUSTOMERS IN THE UK

The UK's largest energy supplier announces hitting 8 million home energy customers, with 2500 new customers joining daily

Market leading support for customers now includes You Pay We Pay, OctoAssist fund and the extension of their electric blanket scheme for Winter 2026

The milestone coincides with a doubling in heat pump sales and a 0.75 rise in solar sales as households shift to trusting in home grown power

London, 24th April 2026 - Octopus Energy has surpassed 8 million customers in the UK, further cementing its position as the nation's largest energy supplier.

With 2500 customers switching to Octopus every day, the gap has widened since Octopus claimed the top spot in January 2025, the first time the market lead had changed hands since privatisation in 1986.

Source: Company Website

++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++

+ ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD. [3 Press Releases]

+ ECOTALK REINTRODUCE BEAVERS TO EAST SUSSEX AFTER A 400-YEAR ABSENCE

We've got amazing news from Ecotalk this spring with the release of a family of (extremely cute!) beavers into Bowyers Wood, East Sussex.

Chris Packham, Ecotalk's Chief Ecologist, was there to help the beavers get settled in. He said: "I just can't remember when I was last so excited about meeting a rodent! Big, fantastic rodents! What a fantastic day for Bowyers. And massive thanks to all our Ecotalk customers for making this possible."

Source: Company Website

+ ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD.: GOOD NEWS AND BAD NEWS: OUR BREAKING THE LINK CAMPAIGN IS WORKING - BUT WE NEED TO GO FURTHER

Britain's energy market is broken. For years, we've been campaigning to "break the link" between the soaring cost of fossil gas and the price of the cheap, green electricity we generate right here in Britain.

Now, the message is finally hitting home in the corridors of Westminster.

There was a flurry of excitement in mid-April 2026 as the chancellor, Rachel Reeves, announced that the government was looking at ways to break the link between electricity and fossil gas prices.

Source: Company Website

+ ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD. OUR DAY WITH THE YOUNG GREEN BRITON CHALLENGE

Four members of the Ecotricity team recently took the hot seats as the judges at Stroud High School for entries to the Young Green Briton Challenge: a national programme that transforms students' climate ideas into real-world action.

For the 'Eco Dragon's Den', our team drew on their real-world expertise in green energy and sustainability. They used this to guide and challenge students on the impact and feasibility of their projects, offering constructive feedback to help sharpen each idea.

Source: Company Website

value.Title: Top 3 US States Losing Big Companies Jobs in 2026 Amid Tech Layoffs and Economic Shifts

Document.Content:
urn:contentItem:6JG9-TVT3-RWN2-D4N4-00000-00Top 3 US States Losing Big Companies Jobs in 2026 Amid Tech Layoffs and Economic Shifts2026-05-01T00:00:00Z2026-05-28T16:05:26ZLexisNexisTop 3 US States Losing Big Companies Jobs in 2026 Amid Tech Layoffs and Economic Shifts

The Newstex Authoritative Content shall be construed as author-based content and commentary. Accordingly, no warranties or other guarantees are offered as to the quality of the opinions, commentary or anything else appearing in such Newstex Authoritative Content. Newstex and its re-distributors expressly reserve the right to delete stories at its and their sole discretion.

Tony Jackson

May 1st, 2026 ( International Business Times Australia - Delivered by Newstex )

NEW YORK - California, Texas and Washington are emerging as the top three states experiencing the heaviest job losses from major corporations in 2026, driven by widespread tech sector restructuring, artificial intelligence adoption and broader economic pressures that have prompted thousands of layoffs across Fortune 500 companies.

LOS ANGELES

Data from Worker Adjustment and Retraining Notification filings and industry trackers show these states accounting for a disproportionate share of announced cuts. California leads by a wide margin, followed by Texas and Washington, as companies streamline operations, automate roles and respond to shifting market conditions. The trend reflects a broader national wave of efficiency drives that has seen over a million job cuts announced in recent periods, with technology and related sectors hit hardest.

California: Tech Hub Bears Brunt of Industry Restructuring California continues to lead the nation in corporate job losses, with more than 175,000 positions affected in recent tracking periods. The state's concentration of technology giants has made it particularly vulnerable to AI-driven changes and cost-cutting measures. Companies like Amazon, Oracle, Meta and Snap have announced significant reductions, contributing to tens of thousands of tech layoffs alone.

High operational costs, including taxes and housing expenses in Silicon Valley and Los Angeles, have accelerated decisions to trim workforces or relocate some functions. Oracle's cuts in the state, along with Amazon's corporate reductions, highlight how even profitable firms are prioritizing efficiency. Economists note California's heavy reliance on the tech sector amplifies national trends, with AI automation and post-pandemic adjustments playing key roles.

State officials have expressed concern about the cumulative impact on local economies. While California remains an innovation powerhouse, the job losses have strained social services and housing markets in affected areas. Community programs and retraining initiatives are expanding to help displaced workers transition to emerging fields like green technology and advanced manufacturing.

Texas: Energy, Tech and Retail Face Combined Pressures Texas ranks among the top states for corporate downsizing, with thousands of jobs impacted across energy, technology and retail sectors. Major employers including Amazon, Albertsons and various manufacturers have announced cuts, contributing to over 5,000 WARN-notified positions in early tracking. The state's business-friendly reputation has not shielded it from broader industry shifts.

Energy sector volatility, tied to global oil prices and transition pressures, has affected some companies, while tech and e-commerce firms cite efficiency and AI integration. Retail giants facing changing consumer habits have closed locations and reduced staff. Texas' rapid population growth has increased demand for services but also competition for talent and resources, complicating corporate planning.

Economic development leaders in Texas emphasize the state's diversification efforts, with investments in semiconductors, biotechnology and renewable energy creating new opportunities. However, short-term pain from layoffs has hit communities reliant on specific employers. Workforce commissions are ramping up support for affected workers through job placement and skills training programs.

Washington: Aerospace, Tech and Retail Reductions Mount Washington state has seen nearly 8,000 jobs impacted by major announcements, with companies like Boeing, Amazon and others trimming workforces amid sector-specific challenges. Aerospace giant Boeing has faced production issues and cost pressures, while tech firms navigate AI transitions and market saturation. Retail and consumer goods companies have also reduced staffing.

The state's economy, heavily influenced by Seattle-area tech and aerospace, mirrors national patterns of corporate belt-tightening. High living costs in the Puget Sound region have compounded difficulties for employers seeking to retain talent while controlling expenses. Layoffs in pharmaceuticals, healthcare and telecommunications have added to the total.

State leaders highlight resilience through diversification, with strong growth in cloud computing, biotechnology and clean energy. However, immediate job losses have prompted expanded unemployment support and retraining initiatives. Business groups call for policies supporting innovation and workforce development to offset short-term disruptions.

Broader Context and Outlook The job losses reflect multiple converging factors. Artificial intelligence adoption enables efficiency gains that reduce staffing needs in some roles. Economic uncertainty, including inflation concerns and shifting consumer behavior, has prompted caution. Supply chain issues and geopolitical tensions add costs, while regulatory changes influence decisions on where to operate.

Not all impacts are negative. Many companies report healthy profits despite cuts, with funds redirected toward AI infrastructure, research and shareholder returns. New industries are emerging, creating opportunities in areas like renewable energy and advanced manufacturing. The challenge lies in managing transitions to minimize disruption for workers and communities.

Economists expect volatility to continue through 2026 as companies adjust to new realities. States with heavy exposure to affected sectors may face slower recovery, while those investing in future-oriented industries could see gains. Federal and state policies supporting workforce retraining and business incentives will play crucial roles in shaping outcomes.

For workers in impacted states, the situation underscores the importance of adaptable skills and lifelong learning. Community colleges and vocational programs are expanding offerings in high-demand fields. Corporate responsibility initiatives, including severance support and outplacement services, vary widely but are increasingly scrutinized by the public and regulators.

As 2026 progresses, the top three states' experiences will offer lessons for the broader economy. California's innovation ecosystem, Texas' energy and business environment, and Washington's tech-aerospace strengths each face unique pressures but also opportunities. How leaders, companies and workers respond will influence America's competitive position in an AI-driven future.

urn:contentItem:6JGJ-D6Y3-S1D8-305K-00000-00OCTOPUS ENERGY GROUP - HIGHLIGHTS FROM ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD. AND PEER COMPANIES2026-05-02T00:00:00Z2026-05-28T16:05:27ZLexisNexisSTOCKOCTOPUS ENERGY GROUP - HIGHLIGHTS FROM ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD. AND PEER COMPANIES

DASHBOARD: OCTOPUS ENERGY GROUP

PermID5073147691Websitehttps://octopus.energy/IndustryRenewable Energy Supply & GenerationAddress"UK House, 5th floor, 164-182 Oxford Street London W1D 1NN England, United Kingdom"

ACTIVITIES:

Octopus Energy Group, founded in 2015 by Greg Jackson, is a renewable energy provider headquartered in London, UK. Employing over 3,500 people, it generates $5 billion annually, serving 7 million+ customers across 18 countries. Its Kraken platform optimizes energy usage. In 2024, Octopus expanded U.S. operations. Its culture emphasizes sustainability, innovation, and customer focus, with training in clean tech and AI. Competing with EDF, Octopus stands out for its flexible tariffs and smart grid tech. Recent initiatives include EV charging networks and net-zero commitments, aligning with green energy trends. Valued at $9 billion in 2023, Octopus drives the global energy transition.

+ OCTOPUS ENERGY GROUP [3 Press Releases]

+ OCTOPUS ENERGY GENERATION TO INVEST $500 MILLION TO REMOVE POLLUTING CO₂ FROM THE ATMOSPHERE

Major US deal to help cut up to 50 million tonnes of CO₂ - equivalent to eliminating the annual greenhouse gas emissions of New York City

Carbon credits to be snapped up by Google, Meta and McKinsey

Pushes Octopus closer to its ambitious $2bn US investment target, with a significant proportion in California's clean tech scene

London / San Francisco, 30 April 2026 - Octopus Energy Generation, one of Europe's leading renewables investors, is ramping up efforts to slash CO₂ pollution at scale - inking a major US deal that will help remove up to 50 million tonnes of carbon dioxide from the air.

Octopus's fund management team is set to invest $500 million in afforestation and reforestation projects in the US developed by public benefit and climate technology company Living Carbon.

Source: Company Website

+ POWERED UP: OCTOPUS AND MUIRHOUSE SLASH ENERGY BILLS FOR SCOTTISH SOCIAL HOMES BY £200

Muirhouse becomes one of Scotland's first housing associations to roll out Octopus Energy's groundbreaking Tenant Power tariff

UK's first green tech energy tariff that rewards both social housing landlords and tenants

Slashes electricity bills for social housing tenants by around £200 a year

Helping green home upgrades deliver real returns for landlords

London/Edinburgh, 29th April 2026 - Octopus Energy, the UK's largest energy supplier, has partnered with Muirhouse Housing Association to bring its groundbreaking Tenant Power tariff to over 30 social homes in Scotland.

Source: Company Website

+ 1 MILLION CUSTOMERS FOR EVERY TENTACLE: OCTOPUS ENERGY SUPERCHARGES TO 8 MILLION CUSTOMERS IN THE UK

The UK's largest energy supplier announces hitting 8 million home energy customers, with 2500 new customers joining daily

Market leading support for customers now includes You Pay We Pay, OctoAssist fund and the extension of their electric blanket scheme for Winter 2026

The milestone coincides with a doubling in heat pump sales and a 0.75 rise in solar sales as households shift to trusting in home grown power

London, 24th April 2026 - Octopus Energy has surpassed 8 million customers in the UK, further cementing its position as the nation's largest energy supplier.

With 2500 customers switching to Octopus every day, the gap has widened since Octopus claimed the top spot in January 2025, the first time the market lead had changed hands since privatisation in 1986.

Source: Company Website

++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++

+ ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD. [3 Press Releases]

+ ECOTALK REINTRODUCE BEAVERS TO EAST SUSSEX AFTER A 400-YEAR ABSENCE

We've got amazing news from Ecotalk this spring with the release of a family of (extremely cute!) beavers into Bowyers Wood, East Sussex.

Chris Packham, Ecotalk's Chief Ecologist, was there to help the beavers get settled in. He said: "I just can't remember when I was last so excited about meeting a rodent! Big, fantastic rodents! What a fantastic day for Bowyers. And massive thanks to all our Ecotalk customers for making this possible."

Source: Company Website

+ ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD.: GOOD NEWS AND BAD NEWS: OUR BREAKING THE LINK CAMPAIGN IS WORKING - BUT WE NEED TO GO FURTHER

Britain's energy market is broken. For years, we've been campaigning to "break the link" between the soaring cost of fossil gas and the price of the cheap, green electricity we generate right here in Britain.

Now, the message is finally hitting home in the corridors of Westminster.

There was a flurry of excitement in mid-April 2026 as the chancellor, Rachel Reeves, announced that the government was looking at ways to break the link between electricity and fossil gas prices.

Source: Company Website

+ ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD. OUR DAY WITH THE YOUNG GREEN BRITON CHALLENGE

Four members of the Ecotricity team recently took the hot seats as the judges at Stroud High School for entries to the Young Green Briton Challenge: a national programme that transforms students' climate ideas into real-world action.

For the 'Eco Dragon's Den', our team drew on their real-world expertise in green energy and sustainability. They used this to guide and challenge students on the impact and feasibility of their projects, offering constructive feedback to help sharpen each idea.

Source: Company Website

urn:contentItem:6JJN-YDG3-RRJ6-N2GB-00000-00OCTOPUS ENERGY GROUP - THE RECENT NEWS FROM ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD. AND OTHER PEERS2026-05-12T00:00:00Z2026-05-28T16:05:27ZLexisNexisSTOCKOCTOPUS ENERGY GROUP - THE RECENT NEWS FROM ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD. AND OTHER PEERS

DASHBOARD: OCTOPUS ENERGY GROUP

PermID5073147691Websitehttps://octopus.energy/IndustryRenewable Energy Supply & GenerationAddress"UK House, 5th floor, 164-182 Oxford Street London W1D 1NN England, United Kingdom"

ACTIVITIES:

Octopus Energy Group, founded in 2015 by Greg Jackson, is a renewable energy provider headquartered in London, UK. Employing over 3,500 people, it generates $5 billion annually, serving 7 million+ customers across 18 countries. Its Kraken platform optimizes energy usage. In 2024, Octopus expanded U.S. operations. Its culture emphasizes sustainability, innovation, and customer focus, with training in clean tech and AI. Competing with EDF, Octopus stands out for its flexible tariffs and smart grid tech. Recent initiatives include EV charging networks and net-zero commitments, aligning with green energy trends. Valued at $9 billion in 2023, Octopus drives the global energy transition.

+ OCTOPUS ENERGY GROUP [3 Press Releases]

+ WIND-WIN: OCTOPUS ENERGY GENERATION MAKES NEARLY EUR600 MILLION EUROPEAN WIND PUSH

321 MW of onshore wind added across 17 sites in France, Germany and Poland

Nearly EUR600m invested in Octopus' massive Europe-wide renewable push

These new wind farms will generate enough power for over 250,000 homes

London, 6th May 2026 - Octopus Energy Generation, one of Europe's largest specialist renewables investors, is making a major Europe-wide push into the wind energy market, acquiring 321 MW onshore wind farms across 17 sites.

Its fund management team has invested EUR584 million in wind farms in France, Germany and Poland, on behalf of the Sky fund (ORI SCSp) it manages, accelerating homegrown power across key European markets. These wind farms will generate enough clean power for over 250,000 homes.

Source: Company Website

+ OCTOPUS ENERGY GROUP WIND-WIN: OCTOPUS ENERGY GENERATION MAKES NEARLY EUR600 MILLION EUROPEAN WIND PUSH

London, 6th May 2026 - Octopus Energy Generation, one of Europe's largest specialist renewables investors, is making a major Europe-wide push into the wind energy market, acquiring 321 MW onshore wind farms across 17 sites.

Its fund management team has invested EUR584 million in wind farms in France, Germany and Poland, on behalf of the Sky fund (ORI SCSp) it manages, accelerating homegrown power across key European markets. These wind farms will generate enough clean power for over 250,000 homes.

Octopus now manages over 400 large-scale renewables projects across the globe, as it continues to scale cheap, green power at lightning speed. With these latest deals, it manages 67 onshore wind farms in Europe, including the UK, France, Germany, Poland, Ireland, Sweden and Finland.

Source: Company Website

+ OCTOPUS ENERGY GENERATION TO INVEST $500 MILLION TO REMOVE POLLUTING CO₂ FROM THE ATMOSPHERE

Major US deal to help cut up to 50 million tonnes of CO₂ - equivalent to eliminating the annual greenhouse gas emissions of New York City

Carbon credits to be snapped up by Google, Meta and McKinsey

Pushes Octopus closer to its ambitious $2bn US investment target, with a significant proportion in California's clean tech scene

London / San Francisco, 30 April 2026 - Octopus Energy Generation, one of Europe's leading renewables investors, is ramping up efforts to slash CO₂ pollution at scale - inking a major US deal that will help remove up to 50 million tonnes of carbon dioxide from the air.

Octopus's fund management team is set to invest $500 million in afforestation and reforestation projects in the US developed by public benefit and climate technology company Living Carbon.

Source: Company Website

++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++

+ ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD. [3 Press Releases]

+ ECOTALK REINTRODUCE BEAVERS TO EAST SUSSEX AFTER A 400-YEAR ABSENCE

We've got amazing news from Ecotalk this spring with the release of a family of (extremely cute!) beavers into Bowyers Wood, East Sussex.

Chris Packham, Ecotalk's Chief Ecologist, was there to help the beavers get settled in. He said: "I just can't remember when I was last so excited about meeting a rodent! Big, fantastic rodents! What a fantastic day for Bowyers. And massive thanks to all our Ecotalk customers for making this possible."

Source: Company Website

+ ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD.: GOOD NEWS AND BAD NEWS: OUR BREAKING THE LINK CAMPAIGN IS WORKING - BUT WE NEED TO GO FURTHER

Britain's energy market is broken. For years, we've been campaigning to "break the link" between the soaring cost of fossil gas and the price of the cheap, green electricity we generate right here in Britain.

Now, the message is finally hitting home in the corridors of Westminster.

There was a flurry of excitement in mid-April 2026 as the chancellor, Rachel Reeves, announced that the government was looking at ways to break the link between electricity and fossil gas prices.

Source: Company Website

+ ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD. OUR DAY WITH THE YOUNG GREEN BRITON CHALLENGE

Four members of the Ecotricity team recently took the hot seats as the judges at Stroud High School for entries to the Young Green Briton Challenge: a national programme that transforms students' climate ideas into real-world action.

For the 'Eco Dragon's Den', our team drew on their real-world expertise in green energy and sustainability. They used this to guide and challenge students on the impact and feasibility of their projects, offering constructive feedback to help sharpen each idea.

Source: Company Website

urn:contentItem:6JJP-KX53-RY52-60X1-00000-00OCTOPUS ENERGY GROUP - SECTOR UPDATES: INDUSTRY LEADERS & PEERS UPDATE2026-05-12T00:00:00Z2026-05-28T16:05:27ZLexisNexisSTOCKOCTOPUS ENERGY GROUP - SECTOR UPDATES: INDUSTRY LEADERS & PEERS UPDATE

DASHBOARD: OCTOPUS ENERGY GROUP

PermID5073147691Websitehttps://octopus.energy/IndustryRenewable Energy Supply & GenerationAddress"UK House, 5th floor, 164-182 Oxford Street London W1D 1NN England, United Kingdom"

ACTIVITIES:

Octopus Energy Group, founded in 2015 by Greg Jackson, is a renewable energy provider headquartered in London, UK. Employing over 3,500 people, it generates $5 billion annually, serving 7 million+ customers across 18 countries. Its Kraken platform optimizes energy usage. In 2024, Octopus expanded U.S. operations. Its culture emphasizes sustainability, innovation, and customer focus, with training in clean tech and AI. Competing with EDF, Octopus stands out for its flexible tariffs and smart grid tech. Recent initiatives include EV charging networks and net-zero commitments, aligning with green energy trends. Valued at $9 billion in 2023, Octopus drives the global energy transition.

+ OCTOPUS ENERGY GROUP [3 Press Releases]

+ WIND-WIN: OCTOPUS ENERGY GENERATION MAKES NEARLY EUR600 MILLION EUROPEAN WIND PUSH

321 MW of onshore wind added across 17 sites in France, Germany and Poland

Nearly EUR600m invested in Octopus' massive Europe-wide renewable push

These new wind farms will generate enough power for over 250,000 homes

London, 6th May 2026 - Octopus Energy Generation, one of Europe's largest specialist renewables investors, is making a major Europe-wide push into the wind energy market, acquiring 321 MW onshore wind farms across 17 sites.

Its fund management team has invested EUR584 million in wind farms in France, Germany and Poland, on behalf of the Sky fund (ORI SCSp) it manages, accelerating homegrown power across key European markets. These wind farms will generate enough clean power for over 250,000 homes.

Source: Company Website

+ OCTOPUS ENERGY GROUP WIND-WIN: OCTOPUS ENERGY GENERATION MAKES NEARLY EUR600 MILLION EUROPEAN WIND PUSH

London, 6th May 2026 - Octopus Energy Generation, one of Europe's largest specialist renewables investors, is making a major Europe-wide push into the wind energy market, acquiring 321 MW onshore wind farms across 17 sites.

Its fund management team has invested EUR584 million in wind farms in France, Germany and Poland, on behalf of the Sky fund (ORI SCSp) it manages, accelerating homegrown power across key European markets. These wind farms will generate enough clean power for over 250,000 homes.

Octopus now manages over 400 large-scale renewables projects across the globe, as it continues to scale cheap, green power at lightning speed. With these latest deals, it manages 67 onshore wind farms in Europe, including the UK, France, Germany, Poland, Ireland, Sweden and Finland.

Source: Company Website

+ OCTOPUS ENERGY GENERATION TO INVEST $500 MILLION TO REMOVE POLLUTING CO₂ FROM THE ATMOSPHERE

Major US deal to help cut up to 50 million tonnes of CO₂ - equivalent to eliminating the annual greenhouse gas emissions of New York City

Carbon credits to be snapped up by Google, Meta and McKinsey

Pushes Octopus closer to its ambitious $2bn US investment target, with a significant proportion in California's clean tech scene

London / San Francisco, 30 April 2026 - Octopus Energy Generation, one of Europe's leading renewables investors, is ramping up efforts to slash CO₂ pollution at scale - inking a major US deal that will help remove up to 50 million tonnes of carbon dioxide from the air.

Octopus's fund management team is set to invest $500 million in afforestation and reforestation projects in the US developed by public benefit and climate technology company Living Carbon.

Source: Company Website

++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++

+ ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD. [3 Press Releases]

+ ECOTALK REINTRODUCE BEAVERS TO EAST SUSSEX AFTER A 400-YEAR ABSENCE

We've got amazing news from Ecotalk this spring with the release of a family of (extremely cute!) beavers into Bowyers Wood, East Sussex.

Chris Packham, Ecotalk's Chief Ecologist, was there to help the beavers get settled in. He said: "I just can't remember when I was last so excited about meeting a rodent! Big, fantastic rodents! What a fantastic day for Bowyers. And massive thanks to all our Ecotalk customers for making this possible."

Source: Company Website

+ ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD.: GOOD NEWS AND BAD NEWS: OUR BREAKING THE LINK CAMPAIGN IS WORKING - BUT WE NEED TO GO FURTHER

Britain's energy market is broken. For years, we've been campaigning to "break the link" between the soaring cost of fossil gas and the price of the cheap, green electricity we generate right here in Britain.

Now, the message is finally hitting home in the corridors of Westminster.

There was a flurry of excitement in mid-April 2026 as the chancellor, Rachel Reeves, announced that the government was looking at ways to break the link between electricity and fossil gas prices.

Source: Company Website

+ ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD. OUR DAY WITH THE YOUNG GREEN BRITON CHALLENGE

Four members of the Ecotricity team recently took the hot seats as the judges at Stroud High School for entries to the Young Green Briton Challenge: a national programme that transforms students' climate ideas into real-world action.

For the 'Eco Dragon's Den', our team drew on their real-world expertise in green energy and sustainability. They used this to guide and challenge students on the impact and feasibility of their projects, offering constructive feedback to help sharpen each idea.

Source: Company Website

++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++

urn:contentItem:6JJT-FRB3-RRRN-4329-00000-00OCTOPUS ENERGY GROUP - MARKET DIGEST: INDUSTRY & PEER UPDATES2026-05-12T00:00:00Z2026-05-28T16:05:27ZLexisNexisSTOCKOCTOPUS ENERGY GROUP - MARKET DIGEST: INDUSTRY & PEER UPDATES

DASHBOARD: OCTOPUS ENERGY GROUP

PermID5073147691Websitehttps://octopus.energy/IndustryRenewable Energy Supply & GenerationAddress"UK House, 5th floor, 164-182 Oxford Street London W1D 1NN England, United Kingdom"

ACTIVITIES:

Octopus Energy Group, founded in 2015 by Greg Jackson, is a renewable energy provider headquartered in London, UK. Employing over 3,500 people, it generates $5 billion annually, serving 7 million+ customers across 18 countries. Its Kraken platform optimizes energy usage. In 2024, Octopus expanded U.S. operations. Its culture emphasizes sustainability, innovation, and customer focus, with training in clean tech and AI. Competing with EDF, Octopus stands out for its flexible tariffs and smart grid tech. Recent initiatives include EV charging networks and net-zero commitments, aligning with green energy trends. Valued at $9 billion in 2023, Octopus drives the global energy transition.

+ OCTOPUS ENERGY GROUP [3 Press Releases]

+ WIND-WIN: OCTOPUS ENERGY GENERATION MAKES NEARLY EUR600 MILLION EUROPEAN WIND PUSH

321 MW of onshore wind added across 17 sites in France, Germany and Poland

Nearly EUR600m invested in Octopus' massive Europe-wide renewable push

These new wind farms will generate enough power for over 250,000 homes

London, 6th May 2026 - Octopus Energy Generation, one of Europe's largest specialist renewables investors, is making a major Europe-wide push into the wind energy market, acquiring 321 MW onshore wind farms across 17 sites.

Its fund management team has invested EUR584 million in wind farms in France, Germany and Poland, on behalf of the Sky fund (ORI SCSp) it manages, accelerating homegrown power across key European markets. These wind farms will generate enough clean power for over 250,000 homes.

Source: Company Website

+ OCTOPUS ENERGY GROUP WIND-WIN: OCTOPUS ENERGY GENERATION MAKES NEARLY EUR600 MILLION EUROPEAN WIND PUSH

London, 6th May 2026 - Octopus Energy Generation, one of Europe's largest specialist renewables investors, is making a major Europe-wide push into the wind energy market, acquiring 321 MW onshore wind farms across 17 sites.

Its fund management team has invested EUR584 million in wind farms in France, Germany and Poland, on behalf of the Sky fund (ORI SCSp) it manages, accelerating homegrown power across key European markets. These wind farms will generate enough clean power for over 250,000 homes.

Octopus now manages over 400 large-scale renewables projects across the globe, as it continues to scale cheap, green power at lightning speed. With these latest deals, it manages 67 onshore wind farms in Europe, including the UK, France, Germany, Poland, Ireland, Sweden and Finland.

Source: Company Website

+ OCTOPUS ENERGY GENERATION TO INVEST $500 MILLION TO REMOVE POLLUTING CO₂ FROM THE ATMOSPHERE

Major US deal to help cut up to 50 million tonnes of CO₂ - equivalent to eliminating the annual greenhouse gas emissions of New York City

Carbon credits to be snapped up by Google, Meta and McKinsey

Pushes Octopus closer to its ambitious $2bn US investment target, with a significant proportion in California's clean tech scene

London / San Francisco, 30 April 2026 - Octopus Energy Generation, one of Europe's leading renewables investors, is ramping up efforts to slash CO₂ pollution at scale - inking a major US deal that will help remove up to 50 million tonnes of carbon dioxide from the air.

Octopus's fund management team is set to invest $500 million in afforestation and reforestation projects in the US developed by public benefit and climate technology company Living Carbon.

Source: Company Website

++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++

+ ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD. [3 Press Releases]

+ ECOTALK REINTRODUCE BEAVERS TO EAST SUSSEX AFTER A 400-YEAR ABSENCE

We've got amazing news from Ecotalk this spring with the release of a family of (extremely cute!) beavers into Bowyers Wood, East Sussex.

Chris Packham, Ecotalk's Chief Ecologist, was there to help the beavers get settled in. He said: "I just can't remember when I was last so excited about meeting a rodent! Big, fantastic rodents! What a fantastic day for Bowyers. And massive thanks to all our Ecotalk customers for making this possible."

Source: Company Website

+ ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD.: GOOD NEWS AND BAD NEWS: OUR BREAKING THE LINK CAMPAIGN IS WORKING - BUT WE NEED TO GO FURTHER

Britain's energy market is broken. For years, we've been campaigning to "break the link" between the soaring cost of fossil gas and the price of the cheap, green electricity we generate right here in Britain.

Now, the message is finally hitting home in the corridors of Westminster.

There was a flurry of excitement in mid-April 2026 as the chancellor, Rachel Reeves, announced that the government was looking at ways to break the link between electricity and fossil gas prices.

Source: Company Website

+ ECOTRICITY GROUP LTD. OUR DAY WITH THE YOUNG GREEN BRITON CHALLENGE

Four members of the Ecotricity team recently took the hot seats as the judges at Stroud High School for entries to the Young Green Briton Challenge: a national programme that transforms students' climate ideas into real-world action.

For the 'Eco Dragon's Den', our team drew on their real-world expertise in green energy and sustainability. They used this to guide and challenge students on the impact and feasibility of their projects, offering constructive feedback to help sharpen each idea.

Source: Company Website

(NYSE:MHF) ticks up 1.2% in Week 18 of 2026: Stock Performance and Benchmarking

NYSE END-OF-WEEK STOCK REPORT

www.buysellsignals.com

Western Asset Municipal High Income Fund, Inc. (NYSE:MHF $6.98), has risen 8c (or 1.2%) to close at $6.98. The stock rose for a second consecutive week on Friday bringing its two-week rise to 12.0c or 1.7%. Compared with the S&P 500 Index which rose 233.8 points (or 3.3%) in the two weeks, this represented a relative price change of -1.5%.

In the past two weeks the market cap has risen by $2.6 million to $153.6 million.

The volume was 0.7 times average trading per week of 317,720 shares.

UPCOMING EVENT: DIVIDEND

The company announced a monthly dividend of 3.40c per share; ex-dividend date is Thursday, May 21; the payable date is Friday, May 29; the record date is Thursday, May 21.

SECTION 2 CORPORATE PROFILE

2.1 Activities

Western Asset Municipal High Income Fund, Inc., a closed-end management investment company listed on the New York Stock Exchange, focuses on generating high-yield income through a diversified portfolio of municipal bonds. Its core activities involve investing in tax-exempt securities issued by state and local governments, primarily targeting sectors such as healthcare, education, and infrastructure to deliver steady returns to shareholders while emphasizing capital preservation. The fund's fastest-growing segments include high-yield municipal bonds, which have seen increased demand amid rising infrastructure needs and fiscal recovery efforts, as well as opportunities in sustainable projects like green energy initiatives. This strategic emphasis on lower-rated, higher-yielding bonds helps the fund capitalize on market trends, providing tax-efficient income in a dynamic economic landscape and supporting long-term growth for investors.
